examples: I was distraught and let out a bellow of tearful rage.
Saul Bellow describes his impressions of the seemingly endless cornfields of Illinois.
Her friend Saul Bellow wrote in a letter that Marilyn conducts herself like a philosopher.
The dozen male actors swagger and bellow and carouse in various newsroom and cop roles.
With success came a stern commitment to writing that contributed to Mr Bellow's four divorces.
